props.description: PagerDuty routed High5xxRate to SRE at 14:00 UTC. payments-api (prod, tier-1) is 5xx-ing on ~40% of requests; throughput holds but the error tail drags p99 to 4.2s while p50 stays flat — a code-fault shape. Onset is 13 minutes after release v4.12.0 (13:47). Card auth + capture impacted.
props.short_description: payments-api 5xx spiked to 40% ~13m after the v4.12.0 deploy
props.title: payments-api elevated 5xx errors

work_notes.author: monitoring.alerting
work_notes.text: PagerDuty routed High5xxRate to SRE — payments-api 5xx spiking to ~40%.

work_notes.author: sre-oncall
work_notes.text: Acked. v4.12.0 shipped 13:47, ~13m before onset — deploy is the leading suspect.

work_notes.author: sre-oncall
work_notes.text: Declared SEV2 — card auth + capture impacted, tier-1 SLO burning.

props.description: Standard release of payments-api v4.12.0 via Argo Rollouts; bumps the shared taxcalc library to add intl VAT regions. Blue/green with a 10% canary, auto-promoted after the analysis gate.
props.short_description: Deploy payments-api v4.12.0 to prod (intl tax-calc)

props.author: dev-kco
props.message: feat(tax): add intl VAT regions via shared taxcalc v4.12.0 (PR #1487)

props.short_description: billing-api NPE in TaxCalculator after adopting shared taxcalc
props.title: billing-api 5xx after v4.12.0

props.short_description: invoicing-api same TaxCalculator NPE, lower volume
props.title: invoicing-api intermittent 5xx

props.statement: v4.12.0 (commit abc123) introduced a NullPointerException in TaxCalculator

props.message: Cannot invoke "com.corp.geo.Region.getCode()" because the return value of "com.corp.order.Order.getRegion()" is null

hypotheses.basis: rollback cleared 5xx to 1% — recovery confirms the causal chain
hypotheses.statement: v4.12.0 (commit abc123) introduced a NullPointerException in TaxCalculator

journal.narrative: payments-api 5xx spiked to 40% at 14:00, 13m after the v4.12.0 deploy at 13:47. Declared SEV2. Still bleeding; the only dependency is payments-ora. Investigate, don't blind-mitigate.

todos.objective: pull the incident record to scope impact, tier and SLO
todos.observation: INC-4821: payments-api (prod, tier-1, SLO 99.9%) declared SEV2 at 14:00 — card auth + capture impacted, onset ~13m after v4.12.0.

todos.objective: quantify the blast radius — how much is 5xx-ing, and what is the latency shape
todos.observation: 40% of ~820 rpm are 5xx; p50 holds at 58ms but the error tail drags p99 to 4.2s — a code-fault shape, not saturation.
payments-api's only declared dependency is payments-ora (Oracle 19c).

todos.objective: find the change that lines up with onset
todos.observation: v4.12.0 (CHG-1) deployed at 13:47 — 13 minutes before onset; it bumps the shared taxcalc library.

todos.objective: capture the error shape at onset
todos.observation: a captured onset trace errored after ~920ms against payments-api.

journal.narrative: start from the incident of record — who paged, what tier is at risk, what SLO it burns
journal.result: INC-4821: payments-api (prod, tier-1, SLO 99.9%) declared SEV2 at 14:00 — card auth + capture impacted, onset ~13m after v4.12.0.

journal.narrative: measure the RED signals over the onset window — error ratio, throughput and the p50/p99 latency spread
journal.result: 40% of ~820 rpm are 5xx; p50 holds at 58ms but the error tail drags p99 to 4.2s — a code-fault shape, not saturation.

journal.narrative: pull the declared topology — a failing dependency is the alternative to a code fault
journal.result: payments-api's only declared dependency is payments-ora (Oracle 19c).

journal.narrative: change-first triage — a deploy minutes before onset is the prime suspect
journal.result: v4.12.0 (CHG-1) deployed at 13:47 — 13 minutes before onset; it bumps the shared taxcalc library.

journal.narrative: pull a trace from the onset window to see how the request actually fails
journal.result: a captured onset trace errored after ~920ms against payments-api.

journal.goal: Normalize the signal: fix scope/severity/onset, seed the symptom (Anomaly) + subject + topology + candidate changes, and scope the impact.
journal.narrative: payments-api 5xx spiked to 40% at 14:00, 13m after the v4.12.0 deploy at 13:47. Declared SEV2. Still bleeding; the only dependency is payments-ora. Investigate, don't blind-mitigate.

Change-first: the deploy is the prime suspect (H1); the DB is a weaker alternative (H2). 2 sibling services (billing-api, invoicing-api) filed the same NPE after adopting the shared taxcalc lib in v4.12.0 — a related prior reinforcing H1.

todos.objective: identify exactly what code shipped in the change
todos.observation: abc123 (PR #1487) adds intl VAT regions via the shared taxcalc library — the code v4.12.0 shipped.

todos.objective: check whether any sibling service hit the same failure
todos.observation: billing-api and invoicing-api both filed the same TaxCalculator NPE after adopting the shared taxcalc lib in v4.12.0.

todos.objective: frame the rival hypotheses to test
todos.observation: change-first: the deploy (abc123) is the prime suspect (H1); payments-ora pool exhaustion is the weaker alternative (H2).

journal.narrative: read the commit behind CHG-1 — what did the deploy actually change
journal.result: abc123 (PR #1487) adds intl VAT regions via the shared taxcalc library — the code v4.12.0 shipped.

journal.narrative: co-firing incidents on the same shared library would sharpen the code-fault hypothesis
journal.result: billing-api and invoicing-api both filed the same TaxCalculator NPE after adopting the shared taxcalc lib in v4.12.0.

journal.goal: ONE loop — hypothesize ⇄ gather evidence ⇄ refute: generate causal explanations change-first, gather targeted evidence to confirm or refute the leader, rule out rivals.
journal.narrative: Change-first: the deploy is the prime suspect (H1); the DB is a weaker alternative (H2). 2 sibling services (billing-api, invoicing-api) filed the same NPE after adopting the shared taxcalc lib in v4.12.0 — a related prior reinforcing H1.
Ruled out the DB (pool 28%, 56/200 conns, no slow-query surge). Traces pin an NPE in TaxCalculator introduced by abc123.

todos.objective: rule the database in or out — is payments-ora saturated
todos.observation: payments-ora is healthy on every axis: pool 28% (56/200 conns), replication 0.2s, only 3 slow queries/min.

todos.objective: refute the database hypothesis on the evidence
todos.observation: H2 refuted: a store this healthy cannot be driving a 40% 5xx rate.

todos.objective: check whether the stack trace pins the code path
todos.observation: 152 NPEs at TaxCalculator.java:88 since onset — the null Region path the taxcalc change introduced.

todos.objective: support the code-regression hypothesis and pin its root
todos.observation: H1 supported: the NPE traces straight to the taxcalc change in abc123.

journal.narrative: pull payments-ora's USE metrics — pool, connections, replication and slow queries
journal.result: payments-ora is healthy on every axis: pool 28% (56/200 conns), replication 0.2s, only 3 slow queries/min.

journal.narrative: get the top error signature since onset — does the stack trace land in the changed code
journal.result: 152 NPEs at TaxCalculator.java:88 since onset — the null Region path the taxcalc change introduced.

journal.goal: ONE loop — hypothesize ⇄ gather evidence ⇄ refute: generate causal explanations change-first, gather targeted evidence to confirm or refute the leader, rule out rivals.
journal.narrative: Ruled out the DB (pool 28%, 56/200 conns, no slow-query surge). Traces pin an NPE in TaxCalculator introduced by abc123.
Safest reversible fix: roll back to v4.11.3. Awaiting approval (gated).

todos.objective: Safest reversible fix: roll back to v4.11.3. Awaiting approval (gated).

journal.goal: Execute the chosen production-changing action through the human approval gate — early mitigation and remediation are the same gated machinery; success is an approved, executed, journaled action.
journal.narrative: Safest reversible fix: roll back to v4.11.3. Awaiting approval (gated).
Post-rollback: 5xx back to 1%, anomaly cleared. Root cause confirmed.

todos.objective: re-check the RED signals after the rollback
todos.observation: post-rollback: 5xx back to 1%, degraded false, anomaly cleared.

todos.objective: confirm the root cause on the recovery
todos.observation: recovery confirms the causal chain — reverting abc123 cleared the symptom.

journal.narrative: re-measure error ratio and degraded state post-rollback — did the symptom actually clear
journal.result: post-rollback: 5xx back to 1%, degraded false, anomaly cleared.

journal.goal: Did the symptom clear and does the confirmed chain still hold?
journal.narrative: Post-rollback: 5xx back to 1%, anomaly cleared. Root cause confirmed.
Postmortem: v4.12.0 (abc123) NPE in TaxCalculator → 5xx; rollback to v4.11.3 resolved it. DB ruled out.

journal.goal: Postmortem: the confirmed causal chain + timeline, folded from the journal.
journal.narrative: Postmortem: v4.12.0 (abc123) NPE in TaxCalculator → 5xx; rollback to v4.11.3 resolved it. DB ruled out.

narrative.text: payments-api 5xx spiked to 40% at 14:00, 13m after the v4.12.0 deploy at 13:47. Declared SEV2. Still bleeding; the only dependency is payments-ora. Investigate, don't blind-mitigate.

Change-first: the deploy is the prime suspect (H1); the DB is a weaker alternative (H2). 2 sibling services (billing-api, invoicing-api) filed the same NPE after adopting the shared taxcalc lib in v4.12.0 — a related prior reinforcing H1.
Ruled out the DB (pool 28%, 56/200 conns, no slow-query surge). Traces pin an NPE in TaxCalculator introduced by abc123.
Safest reversible fix: roll back to v4.11.3. Awaiting approval (gated).
Post-rollback: 5xx back to 1%, anomaly cleared. Root cause confirmed.
